---
title: "recipe 12 latitude"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-30"
---

```{r}
library(here)
source("https://michaelalfaro.github.io/eeb187-demos/recipes/code/helpers.R")

# ── 1. Load data ─────────────────────────────────────────────
traits <- read.csv(here("data/traits_df_78.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
bundle <- load_bundle(here("data/scarinae-78-bundle"))
bundle$tree$tip.label <- gsub("^([A-Za-z]+_[a-z]+).*", "\\1", bundle$tree$tip.label)
dups <- duplicated(bundle$tree$tip.label)
if (any(dups)) {
  bundle$tree <- ape::drop.tip(bundle$tree, bundle$tree$tip.label[dups])
}

# ── 2. Pull latitude from FishBase (cached) ──────────────────
fb_cache <- here("data/fishbase-latitude-cache.rds")
if (file.exists(fb_cache)) {
  cat("Loading cached FishBase data...\n")
  fb <- readRDS(fb_cache)
} else {
  cat("Pulling from FishBase (slow, one-time only)...\n")
  fb <- pull_fishbase(traits$species,
                      fields = list(stocks = c("Northernmost", "Southermost")))
  saveRDS(fb, fb_cache)
}

# ── 3. Merge and compute midpoint latitude ───────────────────
merged <- merge(traits, fb, by = "species")
merged$Northernmost <- as.numeric(merged$Northernmost)
merged$Southermost  <- as.numeric(merged$Southermost)
merged <- merged[!is.na(merged$Northernmost) & !is.na(merged$Southermost), ]
merged$abs_midlat <- abs((merged$Northernmost + merged$Southermost) / 2)
cat("Species with latitude data:", nrow(merged), "\n")

# ── 4. Match to tree ─────────────────────────────────────────
matched <- match_tree_data(bundle$tree, merged, species_col = "species")
matched$data <- matched$data[!duplicated(matched$data$species), ]
rownames(matched$data) <- matched$data$species
matched$tree <- ape::drop.tip(matched$tree,
                               setdiff(matched$tree$tip.label,
                                       matched$data$species))

# ── 5. PGLS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
model <- safe_pgls(Jc ~ abs_midlat, df = matched$data, tree = matched$tree)

# ── 6. Plot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
library(ggplot2)
p <- ggplot(matched$data, aes(x = abs_midlat, y = Jc)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.7, color = "#264653") +
  { if (!is.null(model))
    geom_abline(intercept = coef(model)[1], slope = coef(model)[2],
                color = "#e76f51", linewidth = 1.2) } +
  labs(x = "Absolute Midpoint Latitude (degrees from equator)",
       y = "Chromatic Diversity (Jc)",
       title = "Does latitude predict chromatic diversity?",
       subtitle = "PGLS controlling for phylogeny") +
  theme_poster
print(p)
ggsave(here("figures/recipe12-latitude-vs-Jc.pdf"), p, width = 10, height = 8)
cat("Saved: figures/recipe12-latitude-vs-Jc.pdf\n")

pdf(here("figures/recipe12-latitude-vs-Jc.pdf"), width = 14, height = 6)
p
dev.off()

summary(model)
```

```{r}
model <- safe_pgls(Jc ~ abs_midlat, df = matched$data, tree = matched$tree)
```
